# External mathematical basis

The project may use standard classical set theory as ambient metatheory,
including elementary facts about sets, functions, relations, finite sequences,
induction and recursion on natural numbers, Zorn's lemma, the well-ordering
theorem, and transfinite induction and recursion.

No external result from first-order proof theory or model theory may be used.
In particular, completeness, compactness, model existence, the Henkin theorem,
and any equivalent form of these results must be developed in the workspace.
